title: LLMs.txt
content: # LLMs.txt This template generates AI-facing documentation exports during the build. ## Generated Files - `/llms.txt` - `/llms-full.txt` ## Why They Exist These files give AI tools and internal agents a clean, structured representation of the docs without requiring them to crawl the full UI. ## Build Integration `npm run build` runs `scripts/generate-llms.mjs` before the Vite build completes. ## Helpful Links Download llms.txt Download llms-full.txt Copy llms.txt URL ## Preview {llms-preview}
